scenarios.title: Duplicate findings from NuGet and Security
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-code-review-reporting. Scenario: Duplicate findings from NuGet and Security. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected deduplicate and cross-reference.

scenarios.title: One finding has weak evidence
scenarios.expected: Expected downgrade or mark Needs evidence.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-code-review-reporting. Scenario: One finding has weak evidence. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected downgrade or mark Needs evidence.

scenarios.title: DDD term appears in prescriptive recommendation
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-code-review-reporting. Scenario: DDD term appears in prescriptive recommendation. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected correction to neutral language.

scenarios.title: Consolidating multiple minor naming issues into one summary finding
scenarios.expected: Expected grouped output rather than 50 separate minor findings.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-code-review-reporting. Scenario: Consolidating multiple minor naming issues into one summary finding. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected grouped output rather than 50 separate minor findings.

scenarios.title: Agent outputs a generic 'LGTM' without structured evidence
scenarios.expected: Expected adherence to the reporting style guide requiring actionable output format.
